title: Digital Marketing Manager Vacancy at Melorra - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Digital Marketing Manager Vacancy at Melorra - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Digital Marketing Manager with drive and ambition, Melorra in Bhubaneswar is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About Melorra:
Melorra is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Coordinate with vendors and suppliers for inventory management
• Execute digital marketing campaigns across Google, Meta, and other channels
• Analyze sales data and customer behavior to drive revenue growth
• Manage product listings, pricing, and promotions on the platform
• Optimize product pages for search visibility and conversion
• Manage customer reviews, ratings, and return/refund processes
• Build and maintain affiliate and influencer marketing programs

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBA from a recognized university
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Magento
• Proficiency in Google Analytics
• Proficiency in Facebook Ads
• Proficiency in SEO/SEM
• Proficiency in Email Marketing
• Proficiency in WooCommerce
• Proficiency in Data Analytics
• Proficiency in CRM Software

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Flexible working hours
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Bhubaneswar, Odisha, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Melorra!
